features: Ultra-lightweight jelly with fine exfoliating powders which exfoliates + helps shrink pores.
description: Product Description In our scrubs we only use gentle, 100% natural Walnut Shell powder to lightly exfoliate your skin, sweeping away dead skin cells + removing unwanted dirt + impurities. We have also pumped this ultra-lightweight jelly full of Glycerin + Betaine so your skins left feeling soft + dewy. Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Juglans Regia (Walnut) Shell Powder, Propylene Glycol, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Leaf Juice, Tocopherol, Euterpe Oleracea (Acai Berry) Fruit Oil, Polyacrylic Acid, Triethanolamine, DMDM Hydantoin, Disodium EDTA, 2-Bromo-2-Nitropropane-1,3-Diol, Glyceryl Caprylate, Glyceryl Laurate, Parfum. Directions Use before cleansing & toning the skin. Wet face with warm water. Apply a small amount of the scrub and use circular movements to gently massage the scrub around the face. Rinse off with warm water and dry. Safety Warning For external use only See more
